name: algebra1
description: Mastering the algebraic expansion of the binomial identity (a + b)^2 = a^2 + 2ab + b^2 step-by-step on a whiteboard.

steps.name: Write the Initial Equation
steps.description: Prepare the writing surface and write down the initial algebraic identity '(a + b)^2' clearly so that it is visible to all learners.
steps.voice_guideline: Welcome to Algebra Coaching. Step 1: Write down the binomial squared term '(a + b)^2' clearly on your whiteboard.
steps.illustrative_image_prompt: Vector drawing of a clean white board showing the formula (a + b)^2 written neatly in bold black marker.

checklist.title: Legible Equation
checklist.description: Verify that '(a + b)^2' is written legibly with clear spacing on the writing surface.

failure_conditions.description: Formula is too messy or small to read
failure_conditions.trigger_description: The written characters are tiny, overlapping, or illegible
failure_conditions.mitigation_instruction: Please write the formula '(a + b)^2' larger and with more space between terms.

steps.name: Expand to Binomial Factors
steps.description: Write down the squared term (a + b)^2 as the product of two binomial factors, (a + b)(a + b), to prepare for multiplication.
steps.voice_guideline: Step 2: Expand the squared term. Write '(a + b)(a + b)' directly below the main identity to show the factors.
steps.illustrative_image_prompt: Vector drawing of the whiteboard with '(a + b)^2' and '(a + b)(a + b)' written neatly beneath it.

checklist.title: Factors Written
checklist.description: Verify that '(a + b)(a + b)' is written clearly directly below the main identity.

failure_conditions.mitigation_instruction: Remember to write out '(a + b)(a + b)' so learners see the full algebraic expansion steps.

steps.name: Multiply Binomial Terms
steps.description: Use the FOIL method to multiply the terms, writing down 'a^2 + ab + ba + b^2' to show the cross products.
steps.voice_guideline: Step 3: Multiply the terms. Use the FOIL method to write 'a^2 + ab + ba + b^2' showing all four individual products.
steps.illustrative_image_prompt: Vector drawing of a whiteboard showing the detailed expanded polynomial: a^2 + ab + ba + b^2.

checklist.title: Cross Products Shown
checklist.description: Verify that the four terms 'a^2 + ab + ba + b^2' are written out clearly.

failure_conditions.description: FOIL terms are incorrect or missing cross products
failure_conditions.trigger_description: Terms like ab or ba are skipped or written with wrong signs
failure_conditions.mitigation_instruction: Ensure all four cross products (a squared, ab, ba, and b squared) are clearly written.

steps.name: Simplify and Prove Identity
steps.description: Combine the like terms 'ab' and 'ba' to write the final simplified expression: 'a^2 + 2ab + b^2'.
steps.voice_guideline: Final Step: Simplify the expression. Combine the middle terms to write the final solved identity: 'a^2 + 2ab + b^2'.
steps.illustrative_image_prompt: Vector drawing of a whiteboard showing the completed proof in a neat box: a^2 + 2ab + b^2 with a gold star.

checklist.title: Final Simplified Proof
checklist.description: Verify that the simplified expression 'a^2 + 2ab + b^2' is written clearly and boxed.

failure_conditions.description: Final simplified formula is missing or incomplete
failure_conditions.trigger_description: Like terms are not combined or final answer is missing
failure_conditions.mitigation_instruction: Combine the middle 'ab' and 'ba' terms to finish with the final identity 'a^2 + 2ab + b^2'.
